name: iot-device-management-platform
description: Scalable cloud IoT device management and monitoring platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && vercel --prod
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/dist

author: Your Name
